blockers.summary: Required implementer agents did not produce an implementation branch. Primary impl-codex exited without taskSummary and its branch remained at the spec base commit ee06aa2837f4831536f4ca038b74c76f2f15a2a5. Secondary impl-claude was started, nudged, then stopped after remaining idle with no taskSummary and the same base branch commit. The integration branch also still points at the spec base, so final review was not started.
